packageRules.description: npm: group minor/patch; majors stay individual
npm: pre-1.0 packages treat 0.x→0.y as breaking (semver convention, ^0.x.y resolves like ~0.x.y); ungroup from minor/patch so they land as individual PRs

@types/node and @tsconfig/nodeXX: no automatic Node version bumps — Node majors are upgraded manually and only to even LTS releases (e.g. 24 → 26). For @types/node this blocks majors only (minor/patch within the current major flow through). For @tsconfig/nodeXX the Node major is encoded in the package name (@tsconfig/node22 → @tsconfig/node24), and Renovate proposes those as 'replacement' updates.
